title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, wrapping the REST API with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers, published on npm.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama chat, embed and LLM wrappers.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embeddings connectors for Ollama, enabling RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama, packaged as a single Docker container.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android support, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based TUI for browsing and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot plugin that routes completions through local Ollama models.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app for managing and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-to-run Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Open-WebUI, and more.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings and LlamaIndex to chat over PDFs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app integrating Ollama for private and channel-based LLM conversations.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that spins up Ollama containers to test LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node enabling no-code workflows with Ollama chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Swift native macOS menu-bar app for starting/stopping Ollama and switching models.
